(Amended) Notice Of Motion To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RUFUS RENARD BROWN'S Amended Motion To File Second Amended Complaint.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GIVEN THE POLICY IN FAVOR OF ALLOWING AMENDMENTS AND THE FACT THAT THESE NEW CLAIMS DO NOT REALLY CHANGE THE ESSENCE OF THE DISPUTE BETWEEN THE PARTIES, THE MOTION IS GRANTED. THIS DEPARTMENT DOES NOT HAVE THE AUTHORITY TO CHANGE THE TRIAL DATE. THE PARTIES ARE DIRECTED TO MAKE THE REQUEST IN DEPT. 206. (302/PJM/VC) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-02-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS BRENT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC. AND MIKE SCRIBNER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - denied. Labor Code 515(e) requires a showing that plaintiff be primarily engaged, meaning more than 50% of the time, in exempt work where one customarily and regularly utilizes discretion and independent judgment at a monthly salary twice the minimum wage for full-time employment. The only element that defendant has been able to conclusively meet is the wage requirement. Even if it were determined that defendant shifted the burden of proof, plaintiff has presented facts in opposition that create triable issues of fact as to whether plaintiff should be classified as an exempt or non exempt employee. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/PJM/VC) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
